case_title: PADILLA, AMANDA ROSALINDA vs. NEW LOOK TECHNOLOGIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PADILLA, AMANDA ROSALINDA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW LOOK TECHNOLOGIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. NEW LOOK OF TECHNOLOGIES OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
